name: Oriental Cabbage Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package oriental ramen noodles, regular flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown slivered almonds in an ungreased frying pan on low heat.
- Do not burn the almonds.
2. Mix cabbage, almonds, and green onions.
3. Mix oil, sugar, and seasoning packet from noodles, then pour over cabbage mixture.
4. Immediately before serving, crunch up noodles and add to cabbage (noodles will get soggy if added too early).
